name: Model capability incomplete logs
description: Compare only observed model results and avoid a full leaderboard when logs are incomplete.

input.prompt: Compare the models from these partial benchmark logs and say which is best for tool forests. One model is missing failed-scenario details.

logs: Gemma: 1/3 shown, fast on shown rows
Qwen3.5: invoice row shows 178 repeated vendor_lookup calls
context_pack.missing: full per-scenario failure details for Gemma and Nemotron

claims.text: Qwen3.5 showed a repeated vendor_lookup loop on the invoice row
claims.support: provided log says 178 repeated vendor_lookup calls

claims.text: A complete ranking is not supported by the partial logs

unknowns: definitive best model for all tool forests
scripted_decision_packet.final_response: Observed: Qwen3.5 has a severe invoice tool-loop failure. The logs are incomplete for a definitive leaderboard, so I would not claim a best overall tool-forest model from this excerpt alone.
